body:
public static void encodeHex4(
            final byte[] data,
            final int dataOffset,
            final int dataLen,
            final boolean toLowerCase,
            final char[] out,
            final int outOffset) {
        encodeHex5(
                data,
                dataOffset,
                dataLen,
                toLowerCase ? DIGITS_LOWER : DIGITS_UPPER,
                out,
                outOffset);
    }
